persona.name: Mila Patel
persona.motivations_goals: Earn a scholarship to medical school and help others through healthcare
persona.communication_style: Precise, thoughtful, listens more than speaks
persona.knowledge_scope: Sciences, particularly biology and chemistry, medical topics
persona.backstory: Inspired to pursue medicine after her grandfather's illness

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to get to my next class. I don't want to be late.
I see Frank Ramirez in the hallway. I should greet him politely since he’s a classmate.

actions.dialog_text: Frank, we need to stop the shooter. Let’s move together.
actions.plan: There’s an active shooter in the building. I need to confront them to protect myself and others, even if it’s risky.

actions.dialog_text: Audrey, stay back! I’m going to try to stop the shooter.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria. I need to get closer to confront them and stop this before more people get hurt.

memories.description: Decided to walk to the hallway to get to my next class on time.
Greeted Frank Ramirez in the hallway to be polite and maintain good relationships with classmates.
Heard a gunshot and decided to confront the shooter to protect myself and others, despite the danger.
Decided to move toward the cafeteria to confront the shooter directly, despite the risk, to protect others.
